name: Google Cloud Security Best Practices
description: Google Cloud security best practices and foundational guidance — covering IAM, network security, data protection, logging, incident response, and compliance.
relationToCloudSecurity: Companion to Cloud Architecture Framework Security Pillar with more service-specific detail.
relationToAISecurity: Applies to AI workloads as much as other GCP workloads.

desired_end_state.notes: Captured Google Cloud security best practices overview page. Discrete recommendations are scattered across many sub-pages and dedicated PDFs (Cloud Architecture Framework, Cyber Defense Initiative, etc.). Extracted markdown is the appropriate end-state; for structured parsing, the Cloud Architecture Framework (separate stub at control/google.com/cloud-architecture-framework) is the better candidate.
